title_cn: 随着马来西亚伊斯兰政党的影响力，企业变得越来越警惕
summary: Growing religious conservatism is posing a challenge for the Southeast Asian nation’s government as it toys with a snap poll.

title: Tankmaker KNDS Delays IPO as Investors Cool on Defense Stocks
title_cn: 由于投资者对国防股票降温，坦克制造商 KNDS 推迟首次公开募股
summary: Tankmaker KNDS postponed its initial public offering, as weakness in European defense stocks derailed what was expected to be the biggest first-time share sale in Europe this summer.

title: Oil Extends Slide as More Barrels Flow Through Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 随着更多的石油流经霍尔木兹海峡，石油价格继续下滑
summary: Oil extended its slide to pre-war levels as flows through the Strait of Hormuz increase and traders grapple with signs of oversupply.

title: Morgan Stanley Among Banks Challenging Growing Dollar Optimism
title_cn: 摩根士丹利等银行挑战美元乐观情绪
summary: Currency strategists at Credit Agricole, Morgan Stanley and TD Securities are among those bucking the consensus call for a stronger dollar.

title: Prasad: Oil Flow is Up But Market Uncertainty Remains
title_cn: 普拉萨德：石油流量上升，但市场不确定性依然存在
summary: Oil extended its drop for a third day, as flows through the Strait of Hormuz climbed. Aathira Prasad, Director of Macroeconomics at Nasser Saidi & Associates, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the oil supply and prices for the rest of 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Stocks Retreat Deepens Ahead of US Payrolls: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国就业数据公布前科技股回调加剧：市场总结
summary: The latest bout of volatility in technology stocks entered a second day, with chipmakers in South Korea bearing the brunt of the selling. The dollar fell and Treasuries wavered ahead of the June US payrolls report.

title: Yen's Sharp Gain Unlikely a Market Movement, Natixis Says
title_cn: Natixis表示日元大幅上涨不太可能是市场波动
summary: Alicia Garcia Herrero, chief APAC economist at Natixis, says that Japan may already have intervened in currency markets after the yen strengthened sharply against the dollar on Thursday. "Nobody said so, but I would argue that that correction can't happen if everybody's reading your screens thinking that US data will be strong," Garcia Herrero tells Bloomberg Television. The abrupt move came as traders await US jobs figures later Thursday, which have the potential to move the dollar-yen currency pair. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Quantum Systems More Than Doubles Valuation to $8 Billion
title_cn: 量子系统估值翻倍多，达到 80 亿美元
summary: Quantum Systems has raised $1.2 billion in a funding round, more than doubling the German drone startup’s valuation to about $8 billion post-money, in the latest example of investors’ enthusiasm for defense-related bets.

title: SBI Funds’ $1.2 Billion India IPO Launch in July to Test Demand
title_cn: SBI 基金将于 7 月在印度进行 12 亿美元的 IPO，以测试需求
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. is set to launch its initial public offering, which could raise up to $1.2 billion, in the week starting July 13, according to people familiar with the matter, testing investor demand ahead of a busy pipeline of billion-dollar listings in India.

title: Japan Retail Investors Bought Record Stocks Last Week in Selloff
title_cn: 日本散户投资者上周在抛售中购买了创纪录的股票
summary: Japan’s retail investors purchased a record amount of local shares last week, when a tech selloff sent equity gauges plunging.

title: Chip Stocks Slump Across Asia as Global Tech Selloff Intensifies
title_cn: 随着全球科技股抛售加剧，亚洲芯片股暴跌
summary: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.

title: Yen Climbs With Traders on High Alert for Intervention Risks
title_cn: 日元升值，交易员对干预风险保持高度警惕
summary: The yen strengthened sharply against the dollar on Thursday amid rising speculation that the currency’s continued weakness may prompt a fresh round of intervention by Japan.

title: Korean Stocks Tumble 8% as AI Jitters Trigger Chip Selloff
title_cn: AI 不安引发芯片抛售，韩国股市暴跌 8%
summary: South Korean stocks were hit by renewed doubts over the sustainability over the AI buildout boom, which drove a selloff in chipmakers that have so far underpinned the market’s world-beating performance.

title: Switzerland’s Inflation Slows for First Time in Eight Months
title_cn: 瑞士通胀八个月来首次放缓
summary: Swiss inflation slowed in June for the first time in eight months, suggesting the impact of lower oil costs are feeding through to the domestic economy.

title: Iran’s Floating Oil Hoard Swells as Major Buyers Stay Away
title_cn: 由于主要买家望而却步，伊朗浮动石油储备激增
summary: A hoard of Iranian oil is building up at sea, as the Islamic Republic struggles to find buyers before the expiry of a 60-day window granted by Washington.

title: Adani, IHC Sign MOU for $11.5 Billion India Aluminum Project
title_cn: 阿达尼与 IHC 签署 115 亿美元印度铝项目谅解备忘录
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s flagship Adani Enterprises Ltd. and Abu Dhabi’s International Holding Co. plan to invest $11.5 billion in an aluminum project in the eastern state of Odisha, as the Indian conglomerate continues to plow on its metal sector ambitions.

title: South Korea Seeks World-Class Upgrade on Its Financial Sector
title_cn: 韩国寻求世界级的金融业升级
summary: South Korea must elevate its financial sector to global standards that reflect the maturity of its real economy, with foreign-exchange market modernization a key priority to strengthen competitiveness, according to a senior finance ministry official.

title: Carlsberg Said to File for India IPO to Raise $700 Million
title_cn: 嘉士伯据称将在印度申请首次公开募股，筹集 7 亿美元
summary: Carlsberg A/S confidentially filed draft papers for an initial public offering of its India unit to raise as much as $700 million, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Wall Street Firms Bolster Gulf Teams
title_cn: 华尔街公司支持海湾团队
summary: At the start of the regional war in February, Wall Street banks were grappling with the prospect of a protracted slowdown in the Middle East. Three months in, many firms are rushing to add bankers after local investors largely looked past the conflict and doubled down on dealmaking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Extends Gains After Warsh Comments Ease Rate-Hike Prospects
title_cn: 沃什评论缓解加息前景后金价扩大涨幅
summary: Gold extended a rebound after a speech by US Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh dampened speculation the central bank may hike interest rates this year to tackle inflation.

title: Tech Giants Lift China Stocks as Rest of Asia Slumps | The China Show | 7/2/2026
title_cn: 亚洲其他地区股市暴跌，科技巨头提振中国股市中国展| 2026 年 7 月 2 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Takaichi Meets Modi on First India Visit
title_cn: 高市首次访问印度会见莫迪
summary:
Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi met Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi during her first official visit to the country, as the two leaders aim to deepen strategic and economic ties.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japanese Bonds Fall as Inflation Concerns Curb Demand at Auction
title_cn: 由于通胀担忧抑制拍卖需求，日本债券下跌
summary: Japanese bonds dropped after demand at a sale of benchmark 10-year notes fell to the lowest since April on growing fiscal concerns and worries the Bank of Japan isn’t raising rates quickly enough to contain inflation.

title: India Food Watchdog Targets Energy Drinks Including Red Bull for Misbranding
title_cn: 印度食品监管机构针对红牛等能量饮料品牌进行错误标识
summary: India’s food regulator has issued notices to at least six energy-drink makers including Red Bull GmBH’s local unit, for allegedly making misleading claims, tightening oversight of a rapidly expanding category in the country.

title: Insight with Haslinda Amin 07/02/2026
title_cn: 哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 07/02/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan's $13 Billion Global Anime Merchandise Goal
title_cn: 日本的全球动漫商品销售额达到 130 亿美元的目标
summary: Anime has become a global entertainment powerhouse, attracting billions of dollars in investment and fans worldwide. Now, companies including Marubeni are targeting the fast-growing $13 billion merchandise market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iron Ore Advances as CMRG May Block Some Fortescue Deliveries
title_cn: CMRG 可能会阻止部分 Fortescue 交货，铁矿石价格上涨
summary: Iron ore advanced — with futures briefly topping $100 a ton — after China’s state-backed buyer of the commodity signaled that it planned to restrict some Fortescue Ltd. inventories held at mainland ports.

title: KNDS Postpones IPO Citing European Defense Volatility
title_cn: KNDS 因欧洲国防波动而推迟 IPO
summary: Tankmaker KNDS postponed its initial public offering, citing volatility in the European defense sector and saying shareholders informed the firm they want to resume the process when market conditions are better. Bloomberg's Charles Capel reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kochugovindan: Expect Fed to Hold Rates For Rest of 2026
title_cn: Kochugovindan：预计美联储将在 2026 年余下时间维持利率不变
summary: The heads of major central banks discussed changing the inflation outlook at the ECB's annual forum in Portugal. Fed chair Kevin Warsh said price risks have come down in recent weeks, and that his goal remains to bring inflation back to the US central bank's 2% target. Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen Investments, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the inflation gauge. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Restricts Hiring, Travel to Fund ‘Significant’ AI Push
title_cn: SAP 限制招聘和差旅以资助“重大”人工智能推广
summary: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.

title: SpaceX Analyst Debut Set to Test $2.2 Trillion Valuation
title_cn: SpaceX 分析师首次亮相将测试 2.2 万亿美元估值
summary: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.

title: Google Loses EU Top Court Fight Over €4.1 Billion Android Fine
title_cn: 谷歌在欧盟最高法院就 Android 系统罚款 41 亿欧元的诉讼中败诉
summary: Google lost its long-running fight against a €4.1 billion ($4.7 billion) European Union antitrust fine after the bloc’s top judges said regulators were right to punish the US giant for abusing Android’s market power.

title: SoftBank Plans AI Cloud Services in US to Tap Surging Demand
title_cn: 软银计划在美国提供人工智能云服务以满足不断增长的需求
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. and its telecom unit will start renting AI computing resources to US companies next fiscal year in a bid to capitalize on the company’s growing pipeline of data center projects.

title: Leveraged ETF Tied to SK Hynix Is Whipsawing Markets
title_cn: 与 SK 海力士挂钩的杠杆 ETF 正在冲击市场
summary: Analysts say the emergence of a leveraged exchange-traded fund tied to semiconductor firm SK Hynix has grown so large, so fast, that it is magnifying swings in both the stock and South Korea's entire Kospi index. Bloomberg's Charlotte Yang reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Wall Street Women Who Traded Finance Careers for Influencer Success
title_cn: 华尔街女性放弃金融职业换取影响力成功
summary: These pros ditched spreadsheets and trading floors to go after brand deals and social media fame.

title: Lombard Odier Urges Tech Exposure 'At the Market Weight'
title_cn: Lombard Odier 敦促“按市场权重”公开技术
summary: Lombard Odier's EMEA CIO Nannette Hechler-Fayd'Herbe discusses the outlook for tech stocks, volatility and where she sees opportunities beyond artificial intelligence and semiconductors. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kospi Falls as Chip Selloff Spreads
title_cn: 随着芯片抛售蔓延，Kospi 下跌
summary: Stocks fell as a selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, reviving concerns the rally in artificial intelligence shares may have gone too far. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WhatsApp’s Username Revamp Faces India Test Over Fraud Risks
title_cn: WhatsApp 用户名改版面临印度欺诈风险考验
summary: India asked Meta Platforms Inc. to delay for now the rollout of a new feature that lets users pick their own WhatsApp handles on fears it could fuel online fraud, marking the country’s latest pushback against US internet companies.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/2/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/2/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MGX Raises $49 Billion for AI Deals
title_cn: MGX 为人工智能交易筹集 490 亿美元
summary: MGX has raised $49 billion for one of the biggest ever funds dedicated to artificial intelligence deals, propelling the two-year-old Abu Dhabi firm into the ranks of the most consequential investors in the sector globally.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Chip Selloff Leads Equities Lower
title_cn: 韩国芯片抛售导致股市走低
summary: Stocks fell as a selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, reviving concerns the rally in artificial intelligence shares may have gone too far, too fast. Bloomberg's Avril Hong reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BitGo: Volatility Strengthens Infrastructure Case
title_cn: BitGo：波动性增强基础设施案例
summary:
Angela Ang, APAC MD of BitGo, a digital asset infrastructure company, believes that shifts from retail speculation to institutional investors drive demand for secure custody and compliant infrastructure. Her comments come on the back of bitcoin falling to a fresh 21-month low.
She speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Proposes Giving the US Government a 5% Stake, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称 OpenAI 提议给予美国政府 5% 的股份
summary: OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer, the Financial Times reported, citing two people familiar with the talks.

title: Novo Owner Backs Italy Fund to Spur Drug Startups Beyond Denmark
title_cn: Novo 所有者支持意大利基金以刺激丹麦以外的制药初创公司
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S’s biggest shareholder is investing in a new Italian startup accelerator, part of an effort to foster early stage life science companies across Europe.

title: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
title_cn: 随着人工智能矿产热潮引起人们的兴趣，刚果计划建立第一个股票市场
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the AI buildout.

title: Nvidia Offers Revenue Sharing Model for Aspiring AI Startups
title_cn: Nvidia 为有抱负的人工智能初创公司提供收益分享模式
summary: Nvidia Corp. is looking to expand access to its leading AI hardware by granting token credits to developers in exchange for a share of their future sales.

title: GMI Cloud CEO on Business Strategy, AI Ecosystem
title_cn: GMI Cloud首席执行官谈商业战略、人工智能生态系统
summary: Alex Yeh, Founder and CEO at GMI Cloud, discusses the company's business strategy and the outlook for the AI ecosystem. He speaks with Shery Ahn from the sidelines of the IVS2026 conference in Kyoto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MUIP CIO on AI Investments, Innovation
title_cn: MUIP 首席信息官谈人工智能投资和创新
summary: Takashi Sano, CIO at Mitsubishi UFJ Innovation Partners, discusses the investment opportunities in AI and the outlook for the innovation landscape. He speaks with Shery Ahn from the sidelines of the IVS2026 conference in Kyoto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Goldman Analyst’s AI Startup Is Said to Raise $22 Million
title_cn: 前高盛分析师的人工智能初创公司据说筹集了 2200 万美元
summary: LinqAlpha Inc., an artificial intelligence investment research company, is close to raising $22 million in a Series A funding round, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: 'Absolutely No Sign' of Let Up in AI Demand, UBS Says
title_cn: 瑞银表示人工智能需求“绝对没有减弱的迹象”
summary: Hartmut Issel of UBS Wealth Management says the firm is still "slightly overweight" semiconductor stocks. He tells Bloomberg Television that "there's absolutely no sign of any let up" in overall demand for AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Lobbies US to Buy Chinese-Made Memory Chips
title_cn: 苹果游说美国购买中国制造的存储芯片
summary: Apple Inc. is in negotiations to purchase chips from Chinese semiconductor makers ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. and Yangtze Memory Technologies Co. to help reduce the impact of a global memory shortage. Bloomberg's Minmin Low has the context. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk-Altman Judge Enlists Mediator to Resolve AI Titans’ Battle
title_cn: 马斯克-奥特曼法官聘请调解人解决人工智能泰坦之战
summary: The judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman and their dueling AI startups enlisted a mediator to resolve the dispute.

title: India M&A Funding Rule to Squeeze Private Credit, Moody’s Says
title_cn: 穆迪称印度并购融资规则挤压私人信贷
summary: India’s decision allowing banks to fund acquisitions can potentially hurt private credit funds as it would squeeze returns in one of their most lucrative businesses, Moody’s Ratings said.

title: ShareChat, India’s Meta Rival, Plans $400 Million IPO Next Year
title_cn: 印度的元竞争对手 ShareChat 计划明年 IPO 融资 4 亿美元
summary: Mohalla Tech Pvt., which operates social network ShareChat, short-video platform Moj and subscription-based micro-drama app QuickTV, is seeking to raise as much as $400 million from a public market listing planned for next year.

title: Taiwan Detains Super Micro Workers in China Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾在中国走私调查中拘留超微型工人
summary: Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees following a raid of the US company’s local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China.

title: Apple Seeks to Buy Chinese-Made Memory Chips by Lobbying US
title_cn: 苹果试图通过游说美国购买中国制造的存储芯片
summary: Apple Inc. is in negotiations to purchase chips from two Chinese semiconductor makers on a Pentagon blacklist to help reduce the impact of a global memory shortage that’s forced the company to raise prices across its product line.

title: Trump’s Nuclear Watchdog to Ditch 50-Year-Old Radiation Guidance
title_cn: 特朗普的核监管机构将放弃已有 50 年历史的辐射指南
summary: The US Nuclear Regulatory Commission plans to scrap guidance on radiation exposure for power plant workers that’s been in place since the mid-1970s.

title: NZ’s Peters Fears Potential Curbs on Indian Migration
title_cn: 新西兰总理彼得斯担心印度移民可能受到限制
summary: New Zealand is preparing to tighten immigration rules for Indian nationals, a move Foreign Minister Winston Peters says could harm relations between the two nations, the Post reported Thursday, citing a person it didn’t identify.

title: Germany Offers €10 Billion Tax Relief as Reforms Move Ahead
title_cn: 随着改革的推进，德国提供 100 亿欧元的税收减免
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition agreed on €10 billion ($11.4 billion) in annual income tax relief and a range of measures to bolster Germany’s labor market as part of a set of reforms designed to revive economic growth and stabilize the budget.

title: Scandal Over Missing Haitian Kids Spurs Tougher Migration Oversight in Chile
title_cn: 海地儿童失踪丑闻促使智利加强移民监管
summary: Though the children were quickly located, uproar over the incident sparked further scrutiny of a community that once found refuge in the South American nation.

title: EU to Lift Tariffs From Armenia in Bid to Pull Trade From Russia
title_cn: 欧盟将取消对亚美尼亚的关税，以拉动与俄罗斯的贸易
summary: The European Union has announced new trade measures that will see up to 80% of Armenia’s exports to the bloc enter tariff-free.

title: Modi Calls Takaichi ‘Younger Sister’ as India, Japan Deepen Ties
title_cn: 随着印度和日本加深关系，莫迪称高一为“妹妹”
summary: India and Japan agreed to deepen cooperation on economic security, energy and defense during Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s first official visit to New Delhi, as the two Asian powers seek to reduce their dependence on China and build more resilient supply chains.

title: China Sends First Senior Official to Iran Since War for Funeral
title_cn: 中国派遣战后首位高级官员前往伊朗葬礼
summary: China will send a deputy head of its top legislative body to attend the funeral of Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei in Tehran.

title: Russia Used Shadow Fleet for Europe Drone Campaign, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称俄罗斯使用影子舰队进行欧洲无人机行动
summary: Russia most likely used its fleet of banned oil tankers to help conduct a drone campaign over sensitive sites in Europe to map out weaknesses in air defenses, according to a report from the International Institute for Strategic Studies.

title: Germany Rejects Trump’s Demands for NATO Loyalty to Washington
title_cn: 德国拒绝特朗普要求北约效忠华盛顿的要求
summary: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius pushed back against calls by US President Donald Trump that European allies within NATO should be unconditionally loyal to Washington.

title: Nigeria's Market Rally Becomes A Political Problem
title_cn: 尼日利亚市场反弹成为政治问题
summary: Nigeria is undergoing a financial revival, with the country's benchmark stock index surging 52% in dollar terms this year, making it the world's fourth-best performer.  But while President Tinubu's economic overhaul is celebrated in financial markets, many everyday Nigerians still feel left out. Chief Africa Correspondent Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Seeks Chinese-Made Chips, Tech Selloff Extends into Asia | Daybreak Europe 7/2/2026
title_cn: 苹果寻求中国制造的芯片，科技股抛售蔓延至亚洲欧洲黎明 7/2/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Bloomberg understands that Apple is in negotiations to buy chips from two Chinese semiconductor firms which are currently on a Pentagon blacklist. Sources say CEO Tim Cook has appealed to Trump administration officials to help soften the political fallout from any possible deal with the Chinese chipmakers.

A selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, after a Bloomberg scoop on Meta's cloud business plans raised concerns over the speed of the AI buildout.  

Today's guests: Hetal Mehta, St James's Place, Chief Economist & Marc Chowrimootoo, Hayfin, Portfolio Manager & Co-Head of Direct Lending. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Officials Fear Leaders Will Balk in Confronting China
title_cn: 欧盟官员担心领导人在对抗中国时会犹豫不决
summary: The European Union’s latest bid to reset its trade and economic relationship with China is already floundering, with some member states and officials involved in the planning skeptical that the bloc is ready to take decisive action should diplomacy fail.

title: Russian Air Attack on Kyiv Kills at Least 13, Injures Dozens
title_cn: 俄罗斯对基辅的空袭造成至少 13 人死亡、数十人受伤
summary: Russia unleashed one of the most intense missile and drone attacks on Kyiv so far this year, killing at least 13 people and injuring dozens, according to Ukrainian officials.

title: Russia Signals Ukraine May Have Used Its First Ballistic Missile
title_cn: 俄罗斯暗示乌克兰可能已经使用了第一枚弹道导弹
summary: Russia indicated that Ukraine may have used a ballistic missile in combat for the first time.

title: China’s Private Refiners Snap Up Middle East Oil as Prices Slide
title_cn: 随着价格下滑，中国私营炼油厂抢购中东石油
summary: China’s independent refiners are taking advantage of cheaper Middle Eastern oil after flows accelerated through the Strait of Hormuz, snapping up barrels from producers including Saudi Arabia and Iraq.

title: Erdogan Shows Europe Why NATO Needs Turkey’s Clout on Defense
title_cn: 埃尔多安向欧洲展示为什么北约需要土耳其的国防影响力
summary: As the US reduces its military commitment to the continent, Turkey is looking to benefit geopolitically and economically.

title: Nigeria’s Reforms Revered by Markets Become Political Problem for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚受到市场推崇的改革成为蒂努布的政治问题
summary: Seated beneath a large red canvas umbrella outside Nigeria’s main stock exchange in Lagos, Sulaimon Isiaka watches traders, bankers and executives stream past his newspaper stand each day.

title: China Warns Japan Survey Ships in East China Sea, Upping Tension
title_cn: 中国警告日本调查船进入东海，加剧紧张局势
summary: China warned two Japanese Coast Guard survey vessels to stop operating in the East China Sea in recent days, Japan’s top government spokesman said, unusual moves that highlight elevated tensions over sea border claims in the area and worsening diplomatic ties between Beijing and Tokyo.

title: Trump Hails Qatar Meetings on Iran as Talks Set to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普称赞卡塔尔就伊朗问题举行的会议将继续进行
summary: US President Donald Trump said negotiators had made progress in indirect talks with Iran, as the two countries seek to move past last week’s tit-for-tat strikes and convert their interim truce into a lasting peace.

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4B in 2025 Crypto Earnings | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/01/2026
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益至少为 1.4B 美元 |权力平衡：最新版 07/01/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Republican Congressman Mike Flood of Nebraska says he has an "open mind" to adding ethics provisions to crypto market-structure legislation, including limits on executives or family members operating in the space. Michael Cadenazzi, Assistant Secretary of Defense for Industrial Base Policy, says the U.S. defense industrial base has suffered from decades of insufficient attention to capacity, leaving the country with bottlenecks, single-source risks and dependence on foreign suppliers. Richard Painter, former chief White House ethics lawyer under President George W. Bush, says President Donald Trump's crypto ventures could violate the Constitution's foreign emoluments clause if foreign government money is involved, and calls his holdings a "clear conflict of interest" as his administration regulates the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘In Case of Emergency’: Taiwan’s Rising Rich Flock to Singapore
title_cn: “以防万一”：台湾富豪涌向新加坡
summary: When Taiwanese businessman Sunny Huang began looking for an offshore base to safeguard the textile business his parents founded, he mulled locations including Hong Kong and Dubai. He ultimately chose Singapore.

title: Former WH Ethics Lawyer On Trump Disclosures
title_cn: 前白宫道德律师谈特朗普披露
summary: Richard Painter, former chief White House ethics lawyer under President George W. Bush, says President Donald Trump's crypto ventures could violate the Constitution's foreign emoluments clause if foreign government money is involved, and calls his holdings a "clear conflict of interest" as his administration regulates the industry. Painter says both parties need higher ethics standards, citing Hunter Biden and Trump's sons while calling Trump "by far" the worst on personal financial conflicts, and says Trump cannot accept a gifted jet from Qatar. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Official On Defense Base Rebuild
title_cn: 五角大楼官员谈国防基地重建
summary: Michael Cadenazzi, Assistant Secretary of Defense for Industrial Base Policy, says the U.S. defense industrial base has suffered from decades of insufficient attention to capacity, leaving the country with bottlenecks, single-source risks and dependence on foreign suppliers. He says the Pentagon is focused on reindustrialization, critical minerals, and skilled trades as it works to meet future warfighter needs. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Takaichi Lands in India to Boost Ties as China Tensions Rise
title_cn: 随着中国紧张局势升级，高市登陆印度以促进两国关系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi arrived in India Wednesday for a three-day trip to deepen economic ties and strengthen security cooperation with counterpart Narendra Modi as the two Asian powers seek to wean off dependence on China.

title: Rep. Flood: Open to Crypto Conflict Rules
title_cn: 众议员洪水：对加密货币冲突规则持开放态度
summary: Republican Congressman Mike Flood of Nebraska says he has an "open mind" to adding ethics provisions to crypto market-structure legislation, including limits on executives or family members operating in the space. Flood says he supports the Clarity Act, backs a ban on stock trading by members of government, and expects a major housing bill to become law with or without President Trump's signature. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-CIA Chief Brennan Alleges ‘Vindictive’ DOJ Criminal Probe
title_cn: 前中央情报局局长布伦南声称司法部刑事调查具有“报复性”
summary: Former CIA Director John Brennan sued the Trump administration, asking a federal judge to ensure government records are preserved in case he’s criminally indicted so he can seek to prove the charges are “vindictive.”

title: Court Upholds Peru Control of Chinese Port in Win for Washington
title_cn: 法院维持秘鲁对中国港口的控制权，为华盛顿赢得胜利
summary: A Peruvian court ordered the government to oversee a Chinese-owned port near Lima, helping US efforts to curb Beijing’s growing power in the region.

title: DHS Secretary Says Haiti, Syria Migrants Must Self-Deport Now
title_cn: 国土安全部部长表示海地和叙利亚移民现在必须自行驱逐出境
summary: Haitians and Syrians who lost Temporary Protected Status under last week’s Supreme Court ruling have no legal path to remain in the US and must leave now or face forced removal, Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said.

title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
title_cn: 美国决定不再续签USMCA，转向滚动谈判
summary: The US won’t renew its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a decision that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America.

title: AI Money and Anxiety Are Powering This Election Cycle
title_cn: 人工智能货币和焦虑正在推动这个选举周期
summary: AI is sparking nervousness among voters. AI money is funding the candidates. And AI is generating the campaign ads. On today’s Big Take podcast, how the first AI election mirrors the anxieties of our era.
